debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
inst✝ : CommRing R
ι : Type
I : ι → Ideal R
⊢ Injective ⇑(@Ideal.chineseMap R inst✝ ι I)

proof:
rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x', hx'⟩
  rw [← hx']
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
  rw [← hx'] at hx
  rw [chineseMap_mk] at hx
  rw [mem_iInf]
  intro i
  have : Quotient.mk (I i) x' = 0 := by
    have := congr_fun hx i
    simp only [Pi.zero_apply] at this
    exact this
  rwa [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] at this

  intro i

    have := congr_fun hx i
    simp only [Pi.zero_apply] at this
    exact this
  rwa [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] at this

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x', rfl⟩
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
  rw [Submodule.mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
  have : chineseMap I (Quotient.mk _ x') i = 0 := by rw [hx]; rfl
  rw [chineseMap_mk'] at this
  exact this

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x', rfl⟩
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
  rw [Submodule.mem_iInf]
  intro i
  rw [← Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
  have : chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x') i = 0 := by rw [hx]; rfl
  rw [chineseMap_mk'] at this
  exact this
